label: jump
groundingNote: someone moves in a way of one kind: this someone does something with the body, because of this for a very short time not one part of the body touches the {urn:molecule-v0:ground|ground} [m]; after this the body touches it one more time
notes: Locomotion molecule. 'hop' counted as surface synonym (small jumps; dominant TinyStories use is rabbit/child hopping) — judgement noted.
